top_signals.title: NextEra-Dominion Energy Merger To Create World’s Largest Electric Utility
top_signals.summary: Leading clean energy utility, NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE), has agreed to buy Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) in an all-stock transaction valued at $66.8 billion, marking the largest power utility acquisition on record. The merger unites Florida-based NextEra Energy and Virginia-based Dominion Energy to create the world’s largest regulated electric utility, a power sector titan with an enterprise value exceeding $400 billion including debt. The historic consolidation is directly driven by the artificial intelligence infrastructure boom, with high-performance…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Revolut unveils first physical crypto card as industry-wide card usage grows
top_signals.summary: The card will be usable anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted, and will first roll out firm in the UK and EEA.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
